title: Transport-initialized grouping
summary: The current full-cases grouping was compared against an entropic transport initializer for dimension grouping. The best transport run uses transport to seed the partition, then applies the existing hard local refinement.
note: The taxonomy browser below remains the last regenerated labeled explorer. Full-cases group labels and all-case annotations are pending regeneration after the grouping choice is frozen.

rows.label: Canonical full-cases
rows.note: Current exact-fixed hard optimizer result on repair_loopback_full_cases_300.

rows.label: Transport t=0.02
rows.note: Transport alone improves push/pull but trails all-score.

rows.label: Transport t=0.03
rows.note: Coherent cross-model groups, but not enough under the current final judge.

rows.label: Transport + refinement
rows.note: Best result: transport initialization followed by hard local refinement improves both scores without model-pure groups.
